task: Bottom action overlay reflow and lens zoom control integration

bottom_action_reflow.normal_state: Five parameter entry row plus compact latest/shutter/gallery action row.
bottom_action_reflow.overlay_state: Parameter or lens control panel covers the bottom action layer.

parameter_overlay.presentation: Opaque low-position control layer over the bottom action deck
parameter_overlay.background_opacity: Raised consoleFillTop/Bottom opacity for clearer covering over hidden action buttons

lens_control.focal_buttons: Continue to use device-driven semantic focal capabilities.
lens_control.non_selected_focal_tap: Switches focal and opens lens zoom panel.
lens_control.mutual_exclusion: Lens panel and parameter panel do not appear at the same time.

gesture_policy.shutter_when_overlay_open: Hidden/covered and not hit-testable while parameter or lens overlay is open.

validation.notes: Build passed with the existing nested xcodeproj warning. True-device visual and gesture validation remains required.

risks: Lens zoom panel is style-aligned with the bottom overlay but still reuses the existing zoom dial rather than the full five-parameter ruler tick renderer.
Overlay hides the shutter button while active; this is intentional for R46 but should be validated against shooting workflow expectations.
Device screenshot validation is still required for safe-area and low-position spacing.
next_recommended_package: Device screenshot and gesture validation for R46, then independent Focus UI preflight.
